title: PVP crafting
description: this datapack adds allot of PVP related crafting recipes
body:
This mod adds a few pvp related crafting recipes. this makes the recipes cheaper so is ideal if you want to regear quickly on your server. 

The following recipes have been alterd/added:

- golden apple
- cobweb
- exp bottles
- totems
- trident
- enchanted golden apple
- dispenser
